# Storage technologies

Documentation and resources for data storage on Google Cloud, including , transfer, backup, and disaster recovery solutions.

## Explore storage in Google Cloud

Read documentation and Cloud Architecture Center articles about storage products, capabilities, and procedures.

## Storage products by use case

Expand sections or use the filter to find products and guides for typical use cases.
